description: This file defines the AppConfig class responsible for managing application configuration loaded from environment variables using the flutter_dotenv package. It provides a method to load and validate the configuration, specifically the API base URL.

classes.name: AppConfig
classes.description: Class representing the application configuration loaded from environment variables, specifically the API base URL.

methods.name: AppConfig
methods.description: Constructor for AppConfig, initializes with the API base URL.

methods.name: fromDotEnv
methods.description: Static method that loads configuration from the dotenv environment, validates presence of API_BASE_URL, and returns an AppConfig instance.
